content:
💡 telegram_ex | Elixir
🎯 Primary Use Case: Developing Telegram bots using the Elixir programming language, with support for both simple and complex state management.
✨ Key Features: • Macro-based API for bot development • Handles messages, callbacks, and inline queries • Supports automatic polling • Stateless handler implementation • Stateful handler implementation with FSM
📖 Summary: TelegramEx is an Elixir library designed for building Telegram bots. It offers a macro-based API for simplified handling of messages, callbacks, and inline queries, supporting both stateless and stateful (FSM) bot logic.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
